subject: [PATCH v7 10/20] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support for directory change events in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces notification handlers to handle dir events, allocates a nfsd_notify_event object, and hands off references to each delegation's CB_NOTIFY. If any failures occur during this process, it recalls affected delegations. The changes are implemented across multiple files, including filecache.c, nfs4callback.c, nfs4state.c, and others.
